hero.title: Begin a conversation.
hero.lede: We work with a small number of founders, private boards and family offices at any one time. The conversations that lead somewhere usually start the same way — a few sentences on what you're building, where you've got to, and what you'd like to be true about it in five years. Tell us the shape of it below and we'll respond personally.

formAside.title: Tell us what you're working on.
formAside.copy: The more concrete the situation, the more useful the first reply. Headline numbers, ownership, where you'd like to be in three to five years — anything that helps us understand the brief.

newsletter.title:
One piece, every quarter,
on the work that compounds.
newsletter.lede: A short editorial dispatch to a handful of founders and family offices. No promotion. No noise. Just the writing we would send to friends.

hero.title: A few details, then we're done.
hero.lede: So we can address you properly and tailor what we send. Your information is held privately and never shared.

form.consent: By subscribing you agree to receive Structure Me Insights and our occasional notes. One-click unsubscribe in every email.

hero.title: Welcome. You'll hear from us.
hero.lede: Your subscription to Structure Me Insights has been confirmed. We publish slowly and only when we have something worth your time — essays on entities, jurisdictions, succession and the structures that survive a generation.

meta.label: What to expect
meta.value: A short, considered note in your inbox roughly once a month. No promotions, no noise.

meta.label: Speak with us directly
meta.value: Call our principal on 0477 363 612, or email tarek@structureme.com.au.

meta.label: Unsubscribing
meta.value: Every email carries a one-click unsubscribe. Your address is never shared.
